sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114159" key="xli/dwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλίδωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ornamentation,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χλίδωσι</ref> </xr> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλίδων</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.145a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
